action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate improved to 0.646 (new best, +0.334), with perfect/near-perfect scores on DoorKey(0.96), FourRooms(0.76), KeyCorridor(0.82), LavaCrossing(1.0), UnlockPickup(0.92), LavaGap(1.0), DistShift(1.0) but still 0.0 on LockedRoom/Dynamic-Obstacles/MultiRoom after 100M steps. Training stable (value_loss~0.002, explained_var~0.98, fps~4400). Analysis: FlatObs+MlpPolicy+SB3 PPO multi-task learns easy navigation/puzzles well but harder long-horizon/sparse tasks need more focused samples; ~37min time left allows ~5M additional steps safely (avoids timeout). Decision: Continue from current checkpoint (load+fine-tune with lr=1e-4), bias training_env sampling toward the 3 hard envs via duplicated list in make_env, use 5M steps in 1M chunks with frequent metrics logging (n_episodes=3 periodic, 10 final) for better curves; submit_eval after.
